channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Market trades higher, Omnitech Engineering lists at 11% discount
item.description:
Nifty 50 opens higher after gaining over 50 points in the pre-opening session. On Wednesday, Indian indices closed lower as the Indian rupee hit an all-time low against the US dollar amid Middle East ...

item.title: The biggest losers of the Iran war
item.description:

item.title: Bad timing: New listings sink on debut amid market turmoil
item.description:

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - February 27, 2026

item.title: We tracked 5 years of IPOs. Some hard truths for investors about returns
item.description:

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - February 24, 2026

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - February 20, 2026
item.description:
